name: freerun
description: Freerun web client and proxy services

scripts.setup: npm --prefix app install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix autorun-local install
scripts.test: node --test app/test/*.test.mjs && npm --prefix autorun-local test && npm --prefix server test
scripts.audit: npm --prefix app audit --omit=dev && npm --prefix server audit --omit=dev && npm --prefix autorun-local audit --omit=dev
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run build && git diff --check
